title: Rename schedule section to program
objective: Update the homepage navigation and section labeling so the generic agenda appears under Program rather than Schedule.
instructions: Edit index.html to rename the Schedule navigation label and section heading to Program.
Update the in-page anchor target consistently if needed so navigation still works cleanly.
Preserve the generic agenda content already drafted for that section.
constraints: Do not perform any git operations.
Limit scope to the Program rename and any minimal anchor consistency updates only.
expected_outputs: Homepage uses Program instead of Schedule for the agenda section.
definition_of_done: Section heading reads Program and in-page navigation still works.
ResultPacket lists changed artifacts and doc implications.
